---
title: "Organisers"
---

::: {.container-narrow}

## Organising committee

::: {.organiser-grid}

::: {.organiser-card}
![](assets/img/organisers/pietro-lio.jpeg){.organiser-photo fig-alt="Pietro Liò"}

### Prof. Pietro Liò  
**University of Cambridge, Cambridge, UK**
:::

::: {.organiser-card}
![](assets/img/organisers/dario-righelli.png){.organiser-photo fig-alt="Dario Righelli"}

### Dr. Dario Righelli  
**University of Cambridge, Cambridge, UK**
**University of Padova, Padua, Italy**
:::

::: {.organiser-card}
![](assets/img/organisers/cristian-taccioli.png){.organiser-photo fig-alt="Cristian Taccioli"}

### Prof. Cristian Taccioli  
**University of Cambridge, Cambridge, UK**
**University of Padova, Padua, Italy**
:::


:::

:::
